prompt: Fill the roads with the appropriate color based on the trafic heatmap
prompt_refined: Edit the road network displayed in image 1 by coloring each road segment. The color of each segment should directly correspond to the traffic intensity shown at that location in the heatmap from image 2. Apply a color gradient from red (for high traffic areas) to yellow (for lower traffic areas) to the roads, matching the visual representation of the heatmap.
